questions: Were all merge conflict markers fully removed from src/tickets/index.ts?
Were both the ticket branch's intent (ticket-ref resolution, help handling) and the staging branch's intent (--run flag support for artifacts) preserved?
Do all function call signatures in index.ts match the actual exported function signatures in their respective modules?
Does TypeScript compilation pass cleanly after conflict resolution?

answers.answer: Yes. Grep for <<<<<<<, =======, and >>>>>>> across the entire src/ directory returned no matches. All conflict markers have been removed.
evidence: grep for conflict markers in src/ returned 'No files found' for all three marker patterns

answers.answer: Yes. The ticket branch's extractTicketRef/resolveTicket pattern, isHelpRequested help flag checks, <ticket-ref> terminology, and exitCode parameter are all present. The staging branch's [--run <runId>] support is preserved in usage text (lines 23-24), help text for artifacts (line 99), and the rest passthrough to cmdTicketsArtifacts (line 104).

Yes. Verified all six command function signatures: cmdTicketsArtifacts(config, ticketId, args), cmdTicketsArtifact(config, ticketId, args), cmdTicketsBundle(config, ticketId, args), cmdTicketsGet(config, ticketId, args?), cmdTicketsRerun(config, ticketId), and cmdTicketsContinue(config, ticketId, args, rawRef?). All calls in index.ts match.
evidence: artifacts.ts:18 - cmdTicketsArtifacts(config: HxConfig, ticketId: string, args: string[])
artifact.ts:19 - cmdTicketsArtifact(config: HxConfig, ticketId: string, args: string[])
bundle.ts:29 - cmdTicketsBundle(config: HxConfig, ticketId: string, args: string[])
get.ts:85 - cmdTicketsGet(config: HxConfig, ticketId: string, args?: string[])
continue.ts:9 - cmdTicketsContinue(config: HxConfig, ticketId: string, args: string[], rawRef?: string)

answers.answer: Yes. npx tsc --noEmit completed with zero errors and no output.
evidence: npx tsc --noEmit exited cleanly with no output

statement: Conflict resolution in src/tickets/index.ts is correct. All merge conflict markers are removed, both branch intents are preserved (ticket-ref resolution + --run flag support), all function call signatures match their module exports, and TypeScript compilation passes cleanly. No code changes needed by code review.
